summary: A brief overview of the Roots & Wings Foundation, established by Judy and Gordon Faulkner. It outlines Judy Faulkner's philanthropic commitment through The Giving Pledge to donate 99 percent of her wealth to provide foundational basic needs so children and families can reach their full potential.

principles.statement: Provide people with foundational basic needs so they can reach their full potential.
principles.rationale: Supplying 'roots' like food, warmth, shelter, healthcare, and education is a necessary prerequisite for people to thrive and develop 'wings.'
principles.source_quote: ...to help others with roots – food, warmth, shelter, healthcare, education – so they too can have wings.

mental_models.name: Roots and Wings
mental_models.description: A metaphor for human development and philanthropic focus. 'Roots' represent foundational basic needs (food, warmth, shelter, healthcare, education), which must be secured before a person can develop 'wings' to reach their full potential.
mental_models.example: Committing 99 percent of her wealth to fund nonprofits that provide these foundational needs to low-income children and families.

signature_quotes.text: ...to help others with roots – food, warmth, shelter, healthcare, education – so they too can have wings.
signature_quotes.context: Explaining her rationale for joining The Giving Pledge and committing 99 percent of her wealth to philanthropy.
